overview: A full-stack AI-powered adaptive learning companion that guides users through any topic with personalized tutoring, interactive quizzes, progress tracking, and gamification.
features: Internet Identity authentication with user profile setup
AI-powered adaptive tutor chat with skill level adaptation
Interactive quiz system with MCQ format and instant feedback
Visual progress dashboard with charts and weak area tracking
Gamification with points and badges for learning milestones
Topic browsing with search, filter, and smart recommendations
Dark/light mode toggle with responsive mobile-first design
